steps.title: Use the time cue
steps.content: The first sentence says Salazar's 1873 finding went against earlier assumptions. The next sentence explains what scientists had assumed before that finding, so the transition must signal a prior time.

steps.title: Reject wrong relationships
steps.content: Choice A signals contrast, Choice C signals result, and Choice D signals similarity. The remaining transition means "before this," matching the move from Salazar's discovery back to scientists' earlier belief. The answer is B.
